title: At Last I Got A Letter From The Dead
content:
At last I got a letter from the dead,
    And out of it there fell a little flower, - 
    The violet of an unforgotten hour.
meaning:
Richard Le Gallienne's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "At Last I Got A Letter From The Dead"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
